The '''''Lost Lady''''' was an old dilapidated [[Dartiss-5 Caravel]] used to transport illicit cargo and passengers between [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and the Smugglers' Moon, [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. It operated during the early years of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].

==History==
The ''Lost Lady'' was a heavily modified and battered [[Ubrikkian Industries/Legends|Ubrikkian]] [[Dartiss-5 Caravel]] space barge, deemed even too ragged for the poorest of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] to own. It fell into the hands of the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] scavenger and con man [[Vir Nurb]], who used it both as a shuttle to and from the Smugglers' Moon, and as a smuggling transport ideal for carrying illegal goods right under the noses of the Hutts. To avoid Hutt inspections, Nurb docked at an old junked building in the lower levels of Nal Hutta, rather than using official spaceports. Though the Hutts were wise to this, they turned a blind eye as long as the bribes kept coming.

The Hutts took a greater interest in the ''Lady'' when the rogue scout [[Deggar Feps]] boarded the vessel on Nal Hutta. Tracked by a spy droid, [[NEK-01]], Deggar brought the wrath of the Hutts down on the space barge. To make matters worse, a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] ship, ''[[Dorsal Killer]]'', responded to the [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] planted by NEK-01, and opened fire on the ''Lady''. After a tense laser fight, the passengers onboard the ''Lady'' were able to destroy the homing beacon, allowing the ''Lady'' to return to its flight path.
